title: Grand Depths
description: A total conversion RPG mod set in a complete new dimension with no vanilla mobs or items.
body:
### **A total conversion RPG mod set in a complete new dimension with no vanilla mobs or items.**

> **This is the standalone mod page! For the intended play experience, try the official [Grand Depths+](https://modrinth.com/modpack/grand-depths+) modpack.**
> 
**The new dimension currently has:**
![Description](https://iili.io/qmOCdNt.png)

**[GeckoLib](https://modrinth.com/mod/geckolib) required!**

**Some armor models conflict with OptiFine, so it's recommended not to use it.**

**To enter the Grand Depths dimension you must type /start in chat.**

**Special thanks to my friends for supporting me! Especially MicLS.**

![Snail](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/569d210f34907b5cc0db6a56069a17a0dd717776.png)

**Sound credits:**

- Rock_impact_debris_sounds_small_01022026 by Artninja
- cloth-foley-1 by Pepossum
- Fighting with shovels revisited.wav by CGEffex
- Wood_Creak_02.wav by dheming
